title: jasminum caudatum
intro: Jasminum caudatum, also known as the evening star or star jasmine, is a flowering plant species native to southern China and parts of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Jasminum caudatum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as an anti-oxidant to protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of Jasminum caudatum are typically made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
